prices.source_phrase: We offer free admission to active duty military personnel and their families.
prices.source_block: We offer free admission to active duty military personnel and their families. Blue Star Museums is a program that offers free admission to museums for all active duty, National Guard, and Reserve military personnel and their families from Memorial Day through Labor Day.

prices.source_phrase: Admission is always FREE for Royall House and Slave Quarters members.
prices.source_block: Admission is always FREE for Royall House and Slave Quarters members. Learn how to join.

reservation.source_phrase: During our tour season, no reservation is required for groups of fewer than 10 people.
reservation.source_block: During our tour season, no reservation is required for groups of fewer than 10 people. Groups of 10 or more are considered group tours and must have a reservation. Visit our Group Tours page for group rates and scheduling. Visit our School Groups page for information regarding school group tours.

hours.source_phrase: The museum is open from 1:00-4:00 pm Saturday and Sunday from June 6 – November 15.
hours.source_block:
Hours

The museum is open from 1:00-4:00 pm Saturday and Sunday from June 6 – November 15.

Tours of the mansion are guided and begin at the top of the hour. Admission to the Slave Quarters, which also houses the archaeological exhibit, gift shop, and restrooms, is free of charge.
